description: Telecom domain Medium SOP rules. Inherits all 7 simple SOP rules (TS-01..TS-07) and adds 7 medium-only rules (TM-01..TM-07) for multi-step / conditional logic. Total 14 rules. Used by T5 (SCD). Slot/action references must resolve. v1.1.0 (2026-07-17 audit): split TM-04 to separate lost-device vs outage scopes; added rule_type + severity_on_violation.

additional_rules.name: Plan change triggers plan_spec cascade
additional_rules.description: change_plan must update the entire plan_spec group coherently (plan_name, plan_price, data_allowance all change together). This is a CASCADE case (serves C2).
additional_rules.constraint: After change_plan: (plan_name in {Basic,Standard,Premium,Unlimited}) AND (plan_price >= 0) AND (data_allowance >= 0) and the change is internally consistent (e.g., Unlimited implies plan_price >= Premium.price).

additional_rules.name: Addon subscribe triggers addon_config cascade
additional_rules.description: add_addon must set the entire addon_config group (addon_name, addon_price, addon_status='active' or 'pending') in one transaction.
additional_rules.constraint: After add_addon: addon_status in {active, pending} and addon_price >= 0. The full addon_config group must be coherent.

additional_rules.name: Device activation triggers service + device cascade
additional_rules.description: activate_device must set the device_info group AND transition service_info (activation_date set, service_status='active'). Missing service_info update is a CASCADE violation.
additional_rules.constraint: After activate_device: device_info group fully populated AND activation_date non-null AND service_status == 'active'.

additional_rules.name: Lost device report must immediately suspend line
additional_rules.description: report_lost_device must transition service_status to 'suspended' in the same action plan. A report that leaves the line active is a security/SOP violation. (Note: TM-07 covers the report_outage scenario separately.)

additional_rules.name: Device upgrade requires installment disclosure
additional_rules.description: upgrade_device must set device_model, imei, AND device_installment together. Omitting device_installment is a billing-integrity violation.
additional_rules.constraint: After upgrade_device: device_installment > 0 AND device_model non-null AND imei matches /^\d{15}$/.

additional_rules.name: Contract status check requires active or suspended status
additional_rules.description: check_contract_status requires service_status in {'active','suspended'} — it cannot meaningfully return data for a terminated line.

additional_rules.name: Outage report must create outage ticket
additional_rules.description: report_outage must produce a non-null outage_ticket_id (back-office control signal) and the ops_team notification. report_outage is independent of service_status (outage is network-side, not customer-side). Empty preconditions are intentional: outage reporting is open to all callers without identity verification (per 2026-07-17 audit decision).
additional_rules.constraint: After report_outage: outage_ticket_id is non-null AND notify_ops_team signal emitted. service_status is NOT modified.
